geography.data_source: Census 2011 ward boundary shapefiles, East Delhi district. Covers Patparganj, Mayur Vihar Phase I-III, Laxmi Nagar, Preet Vihar, Akshardham area.

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 East Delhi district tables. Density = 1750000 / 64.1 ≈ 27301. Established middle-class residential zone with good infrastructure.

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round MPCE distribution (East Delhi district). Broadly normal distribution — typical middle-income residential zone. Laxmi Nagar coaching centres and Patparganj IT-ITeS presence diversify the employment profile.

commute_profile.data_source: DMRC Origin-Destination Survey 2022, Census 2011 Table D-13. Blue Line through Laxmi Nagar-Mayur Vihar is a heavily used corridor. Strong metro dependency (0.68) for cross-Yamuna commuters.

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Composite scores. Moderate-high fare sensitivity (0.68) — middle-income but metro-dependent for cross-Yamuna commute. Moderate exam sensitivity (0.65) from Laxmi Nagar coaching centre cluster. ECI 2024 East Delhi constituency turnout data.

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from IHDS-II social capital module. Typical DDA-colony residential structure with moderate clustering. Cross-income bridging (0.16) slightly higher than Shahdara due to mixed housing types.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Laxmi Nagar Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data and DMRC Laxmi Nagar station exit surveys. Major commercial hub for East Delhi — electronics, coaching centres, and retail.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Mayur Vihar Phase-1 Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data. Local market serving Mayur Vihar residential colonies.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Patparganj Industrial Area
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from DSIIDC industrial registry. Patparganj hosts IT-ITeS companies, small manufacturing units, and commercial offices.

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: AGENT_SPEC.md Middle Income Residential template (lines 729-740, normalised to 1.00). Sum = 1.00. Formal sector employees dominate (0.31) reflecting established residential character with office-going population.

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from MCD ward councillor count, RWA federation of East Delhi data, and DDA colony registration records.
